Great, "Investing" is a topic we cover. You mentioned an in-branch meeting. Let me check the available contact options for Investing.

Assuming today is July 24th, "next week Tuesday" would be July 30th. Let me check the availability for an Investing Branch Meeting on July 30th at 14:00.
